title: Hotel Drei Könige · Chur · Hospitality since 1793
description: A family-feeling hotel in the heart of Chur — Switzerland's oldest city — offering individually furnished rooms in a building with over 230 years of history. Seven minutes from the station, surrounded by the old town.
ogImageAlt: Panoramic view of the historic old town of Chur, Switzerland, during the blue hour at dusk.
